title: 2026-06-21 Sydney Wattle Winter Harbor
summary: Normal Chat Voyage daily set for a mild Sydney winter day, using wattle yellow across ferry transit, library outerwear, Opera House theater, and Bondi active-life details.
summaryJa: シドニーのアルバム。色の軸はワトルイエロー。構成は移動、ミュージアム、イベント会場、水辺。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman on a sunny Sydney Manly ferry deck wearing a cream short-sleeve knit polo, navy pleated mini skort with tailored shorts, wattle-yellow wind shell tied crossbody, sheer ankle socks, Mary Jane flats, and canvas shoulder bag
images.title: 01 Transit Manly ferry wattle shell

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman in the State Library of New South Wales corridor wearing an ivory sleeveless rib shell, tobacco lightweight trench, charcoal cropped barrel trousers, wattle-yellow scarf belt, sheer smoke socks, and oxblood slingback pumps while reading
images.title: 02 Outerwear State Library trench
images.locationDetail: State Library of New South Wales corridor

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman at the Sydney Opera House lower concourse wearing a black asymmetric sleeveless midi dress, ivory boucle jacket carried over one shoulder, wattle-yellow enamel earrings and clutch, sheer black knee-highs, and low slingback pumps
images.title: 03 Theater Opera House yellow clutch

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman at Bondi Icebergs tying a sneaker in a close active-life detail, wearing a charcoal thermal top, ivory quilted sleeveless vest, wattle-yellow technical mini skirt over black bike shorts, cobalt crew socks, and white trail sneakers
images.title: 04 Active Bondi Icebergs sneaker detail
